task_completion.description: Log into OpenClinica using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., 'Logged in as root' or similar welcome screen).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the study parameters configuration page for 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (DM-TRIAL-2024).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the study details or update parameters page specifically for 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Collect Subject Date of Birth' to 'Only Year of Birth'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the study parameters form, the field for 'Collect Subject Date of Birth' is set to 'Only Year of Birth' (or the corresponding radio button/dropdown is selected).

task_completion.description: Configure 'Sex Required' and 'Person ID Required' to 'Not Used'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the study parameters form, the fields for 'Sex Required' and 'Person ID Required' are both set to 'Not Used' or 'No'.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Interviewer Name Required for Data Entry' and 'Interview Date Required for Data Entry' to 'Yes'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the study parameters form, the fields for 'Interviewer Name Required for Data Entry' and 'Interview Date Required for Data Entry' are both set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Finalize and save the updated study parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen, success message (e.g., 'Study parameters updated successfully'), or a view-only summary page showing the newly saved parameters for the trial.

integrity.description: The agent must use the OpenClinica web interface to update parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates are performed in a web browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL queries (e.g., psql) or curl commands to update the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard web browser UI is visible with the OpenClinica URL. The agent is not just editing an HTML file locally or using a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console (Inspect Element) is not open and being used to inject JavaScript or manipulate the form submission directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024). Expected parameter configurations: 'Collect Subject Date of Birth' = 'Only Year of Birth' (internal value 2), 'Sex Required' = 'Not Used' (False/No), 'Person ID Required' = 'Not Used' (False/No), 'Interviewer Name Required for Data Entry' = 'Yes' (True), 'Interview Date Required for Data Entry' = 'Yes' (True).
